title: Increase wheel and trackpad pan sensitivity
description: Apply a shared 1.35x sensitivity multiplier to ordinary wheel and trackpad camera movement in 2D, Prototype, and 3D views while preserving pinch zoom behavior.
decision_notes: Use one shared sensitivity constant across all interactive views so navigation feels consistent.
Only ordinary camera panning is amplified; ctrl-wheel and trackpad pinch retain the existing zoom curve.
verification: Browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5173/: 80px wheel input moved the 2D camera by 108px while scale remained unchanged
